title: Xtra Tender Turkish Lamb Revani
description: A romantic Turkish dish featuring tender lamb and egg rolls, cooked to perfection in a tagine, low in carbs and rich in flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the sliced onion, minced garlic, paprika, cumin, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb shoulder to the bowl and coat with the spice mixture, making sure to cover all surfaces.
Wrap each egg roll wrapper around a portion of the lamb, sealing the edges with a little water.
Heat the olive oil in the tagine over medium heat and sear the egg rolls until golden brown.
Transfer the tagine to the preheated oven and cook for 2.5 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Remove the tagine from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve the lamb and egg rolls hot, garnished with fresh parsley or thyme.
